name: Chicken Noodle Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's Cream of Chicken & Broccoli Soup (10 3/4 oz)
3 cups Cooked medium egg noodles (about 3 cups dry)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine the soup, milk, cheese, and pepper.
2. Add the noodles and cubed cooked chicken to the pan.
3. Heat over low heat, stirring occasionally until heated through.
4. Garnish with parsley if desired.
5. Serves 4.
If desired, substitute 2 cans (5 oz each) of Swanson Premium Chunk White Chicken, drained.
